head: edf0c23
objective: Refresh upstream performance, cache, stream, and stability candidate triage before attempting any new runtime change.

upstream_main.head: 8ae2610
upstream_main.subject: Handle Gemma4 bidirectional visual prefill (#340)
upstream_main.reason: No new mainline upstream commit beyond the already-audited Gemma4 #340 head. The branch retains the prior focused treatment instead of broad-merging upstream/main.

candidate_branches.head: 9aa3db2
candidate_branches.reason: Head is unchanged from M43. The branch is a Gemma4 tool-runtime and grammar/reasoning-guard feature, not a bounded retained-workload prompt-processing or cache-latency candidate.

candidate_branches.head: 366ebd4
candidate_branches.reason: Patch-id scan produced no unmatched commits from this branch relative to HEAD. The branch is still a broad distributed rewrite and remains outside the retained local direct benchmark lane.

candidate_branches.head: c86c23a
unmatched_commits: c8275b6 Align distributed MLX prompt caching
e5a6faf Run distributed MLX scheduler on model thread
958ffb8 Run Gemma 4 MLX generation on model thread
b7019fc Handle early distributed cancel requests
3e41fdf Run MLX VLM generation on model thread
c86c23a Run Qwen VLM prompts on model thread
candidate_branches.reason: The unmatched commits are model-thread/distributed scheduler changes coupled to the distributed runtime. They are not a small reversible retained-workload candidate and would need full scheduler/runtime validation.

candidate_branches.head: ea1a6bb

bounded_commit_checks.subject: Avoid rebuilding VLM detokenizer per request
bounded_commit_checks.evidence: Current BatchedVisionModelKit already defines _new_detokenizer with copy.copy fallback and uses it before request insert.

bounded_commit_checks.subject: Fix batched VLM prompt progress reporting
bounded_commit_checks.evidence: Current BatchedVisionModelKit already routes PromptProgressBeginEvent/PromptProgressEvent through PromptProgressReporter and emits cached-token begin events.

bounded_commit_checks.subject: Fix VLM model kit setup edge cases
bounded_commit_checks.evidence: Current BatchedVisionModelKit clamps max_seq_nums below 1 and applies fix_mistral_pre_tokenizer in tokenizer-only setup.

bounded_commit_checks.subject: Run sequential model kit on owner thread
bounded_commit_checks.evidence: This touches sequential ModelKit, generate.py cancellation, tokenizer/draft-model methods, and executor lifecycle. It is a broad threading contract change requiring separate retained text/VLM benchmark and stability validation.

candidate_branches.reason: Useful bounded VLM changes are already present by content. Remaining unmatched model-thread/scheduler changes are broad and not promotable without a dedicated candidate branch and retained benchmarks.

candidate_branches.head: 461015c
candidate_branches.reason: The only branch-only commit adds a prompting model_getter-based LFM2.5 caching test. M51 already adapted the useful behavior as a non-prompting retained-model gate and M52-M54 added benchmark/compare tooling.

candidate_branches.head: 7dfe3cd
candidate_branches.reason: The branch consists of WIP/checkpoint/cleanup commits on an older vision_add_ons architecture and deletes current batched_vision surfaces. No bounded cherry-pickable retained-workload candidate was identified.

decision.next_action: Keep runtime unchanged. If a future upstream branch advances, repeat this scan; otherwise only start a local candidate that has a retained benchmark path and can remain no-promotion until live LM Studio validation is unblocked.
